ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Williams, in person, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

Mr. Williams and the court discuss the issue of the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). Mr. Williams reports that there are no assets to appraise. The court advises that he will be required to file an Amended I&A. The court and Mr. Williams discuss the issue of making distributions without a court order. Mr. Williams reports that he believed that he could made distributions and did so due to a misunderstanding. Mr. Williams advises that his brother and he are the sole heirs and that there are no creditors and that he intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution. The court reminds Mr. Williams that it agreed to appoint him as a self-represented Personal Representative with the understanding that he was required to follow the court rules that accompanied the appointment especially regarding making distributions without court approval.

After additional discussion, the Status for Filing the (Amended) Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Sep-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on Close of Estate is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Continued To Aug-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Continued To Jul-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Williams, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Mr. Williams confirms filing an Inventory and Appraisal on 6/6/2022 and of sending the probate referee the securities information and will file an updated Inventory and Appraisal. The court advises Mr. Williams that he can sell the securities without court approval.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Williams appeared in Propria Persona in person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 8, 1991 is admitted to probate. Steven N. Williams is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before September 19, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. If not, an appearance will be required on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
